# inflateR

> Convert historical monetary values into their present-day equivalents using bundled CPI (Consumer Price Index) and GDP deflator data sourced from the World Bank Development Indicators. Install with `install.packages("inflateR")`.

Version: 0.2.0. License: MIT.

## Functions

- [`adjust_inflation()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/inflateR/reference/adjust_inflation.html): Adjust a historical monetary value for inflation
- [`adjust_real()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/inflateR/reference/adjust_real.html): Adjust a monetary value using a GDP deflator
- [`historical_real()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/inflateR/reference/historical_real.html): Convert a value to its historical equivalent using a GDP deflator
- [`historical_value()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/inflateR/reference/historical_value.html): Convert a present-day value to its historical equivalent
- [`inflation_rate()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/inflateR/reference/inflation_rate.html): Calculate the inflation rate between two years
- [`list_currencies()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/inflateR/reference/list_currencies.html): List supported currencies and data coverage

## Documentation

- [Full reference](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/inflateR/reference/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/charlescoverdale/inflateR)
- [CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=inflateR)
